item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 96 pts (0.451) Buffalo Sabres – 95 pts (0.446) Tampa Bay Lightning – 93 pts (0.443) Montreal Canadiens – 88 pts (0.419) Columbus Blue Jackets – 87 pts (0.408) Boston Bruins – 86 pts (0.404) Pittsburgh Penguins – 86 pts (0.404) Ottawa Senators – 85 pts (0.399) New York Islanders – 85 pts (0.394) Detroit Red Wings – 84 pts (0.394) Philadelphia Flyers – 80 pts (0.381) Washington Capitals – 79 pts (0.366) New Jersey Devils – 74 pts (0.352) Florida Panthers – 73 pts (0.348) Toronto Maple Leafs – 73 pts (0.338) New York Rangers – 65 pts (0.305) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
